definitions.description: Stores in n8n memory, so no credentials required

builderHint.searchHint: Reuse with multiple agents in the same workflow by connecting to multiple agent nodes so agents have a shared context.

properties.displayName: This node must be connected to an AI agent. Insert one
properties.name: notice

properties.displayName: This node stores memory locally in the n8n instance. It is not compatible with Queue Mode or Multi-Main setups, as memory will not be shared across workers. For production use with scaling, consider using an external memory store such as Redis, Postgres, or another persistent memory node.
properties.name: scalingNotice
sessionKey
properties.description: The key to use to store the memory in the workflow data

properties.name: sessionKey
properties.description: The key to use to store the memory

options.name: Connected Chat Trigger Node
options.description: Looks for an input field called 'sessionId' that is coming from a directly connected Chat Trigger

options.name: Define below
options.description: Use an expression to reference data in previous nodes or enter static text

builderHint.propertyHint: Use 'Connected Chat Trigger Node' (fromInput) if there is a Chat Trigger node earlier in the workflow. Otherwise use 'Define below' (customKey).

properties.displayName: Session is automatically scoped only to this memory node. To share a session between different memory nodes, switch "Session ID" to "Define below" and use the same key in each node.
properties.name: scopedSessionHintNotice
sessionKey
properties.description: The key to use to store session ID in the memory

properties.name: contextWindowLength
properties.hint: How many past interactions the model receives as context
